narrative:
Cranberry Township has 1,011 registered voters, with 55.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.3 percentage points.
